ResourceHeader.Description:
ORFEES (Observation Radio Fréquences pour l'Etudes des Eruptions Solaires) is a 5 m diameter 
                antenna dedicated to space weather, the prediction of solar eruptions.
                This radiospectrometer observes the solar corona on a daily basis between 130 MHz and 1 GHz, allowing 
                to track radio frequency emissions from the Sun in near real-time, thus monitoring its activity.

InformationURL.Name: HelioData
InformationURL.Description: The HelioData mission page provides an overview of the mission and more, such as all SPASE dataset records associated with it.
